source_claim: For four strong-gravitational-lensing forward models in 13 dimensions, MIRA ranks the true EPL plus three-Sersic model first.

required_raw_inputs: 100 exact truth parameter vectors and observations
four posterior sets with 20000 draws per truth
complete forward-model constants and executable caustics construction
complete MALA implementation, tuning, versions, initialization, and seeds
verification_contract.verified_rule: Exact released or faithfully regenerated data reproduce the stated ranking with uncertainty and negative controls.
verification_contract.falsified_rule: A faithful run satisfying every source assumption contradicts the stated ranking.
verification_contract.blocked_rule: At least one essential raw input or protocol value is unavailable, preventing either faithful verification or falsification.
